title: Batman 10-Pack (2025)
summary:
center|386x386px
The Batman 10-Pack (JCT91) is a 10-Pack of cars related to the Batman Series. All vehicles featured in this pack are identical to their single counterparts.

title: List of 2025 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary: For 2025, the Hot Wheels mainline is numbered 1 through 250 with color variations not receiving a new number. Treasure Hunts and store exclusives are numbered. For the listing by series see List of 2025 Hot Wheels.

title: Batman 5-Pack (2024)
summary: The Batman 5-Pack (HTV44) was released in 2024. All vehicles were made in Indonesia.

title: List of 2020 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary:
2020 Hot Wheels #1-250
For 2020, Hot Wheels cars are numbered 1 through 250 with color variations not receiving a new number. Treasure Hunts are numbered. This list lists the model grouped by series.

title: List of 2022 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary:
2022 Hot Wheels #1-250
For 2022, Hot Wheels cars are numbered 1 through 250. This list lists the model grouped by series. For the official listing see List of 2022 Hot Wheels

title: Hot Wheels id
summary: thumb|The Hot Wheels id logo|226x226pxThe Hot Wheels id Series features cars embedded with NFC microchips that originally combined with apps and customizable Smart Track sets to play a multitude of games. The id Race Portal paired with the app recorded progress for each car. The portal also connects to regular Hot Wheels track.

title: 2020 Treasure Hunts Series
summary: The 2020 Treasure Hunts Series is part of the 2020 Hot Wheels line. Since 2013, Mattel has incorporated Treasure Hunts into other series instead of being their own series. Treasure Hunts are distinguished by the 'circle flame' symbol.
